title: House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Melantha_Hunting_Lodge.jpg|thumb|right|250px|House Melantha's orbital hunting lodge]]

This '''orbital hunting lodge''' was the host for the [[Vor-cal]] and the [[Vor-cal Feast]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The lodge was owned by [[House Melantha]] and was kept in orbit around the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Vilhon]].<ref name="LOTE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
